overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage transitioning from a sunny daytime waterfront promenade to a neon-lit nighttime urban plaza. The player character walks through a futuristic city environment with modern architecture, palm trees, and reflective wet pavement, passing NPCs and ascending stairs between plaza levels.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic waterfront promenade with commercial buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront promenade toward the wooden pergola structure

entered.detail: tall futuristic building with large DRINK advertisement billboard
curved wooden canopy structure covering seating area
tall palm tree in concrete planter
modern concrete seating with integrated planters
metal railing along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunny, futuristic waterfront promenade with a large green commercial building on the left featuring prominent advertising. The camera moves forward past concrete benches and palm trees toward a wooden pergola structure, with distant skyscrapers visible across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit urban plaza with digital billboards and wet reflective pavement

events.description: hard cut from day to night, transitioning to wet neon-lit plaza with artificial lighting
NPCs become visible standing in groups near the illuminated billboard and stairs

agents.ego_description: walking through the wet plaza toward groups of NPCs congregating near the illuminated stairs

notable_agents.action: group of three NPCs standing and conversing near the Wild Blue billboard
two NPCs standing together looking at their phones near the stairs

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement for Wild Blue with ocean imagery and text FIND YOUR FRONTIER
wide concrete staircase with integrated lighting along the edges
dark wet tiles reflecting neon lights and building illumination
tall buildings covered in bright digital advertisements and neon lighting
scattered newspapers and litter on the wet ground

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a dark, neon-lit urban plaza with wet reflective pavement. The camera moves through the space toward a group of NPCs standing near a large 'Wild Blue' billboard and illuminated concrete stairs. The environment features cyberpunk aesthetics with bright neon signs on surrounding buildings and scattered debris on the ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper plaza level with reflective water features and palm tree planters

events.description: camera begins ascending the illuminated concrete stairs
reaches top of stairs entering upper plaza with reflective pools and palm tree planters

agents.ego_description: climbing the illuminated stairs and continuing through the upper plaza with reflective water features

entered.detail: shallow pools of water reflecting neon lights and surrounding buildings
palm trees planted in raised beds surrounded by water
row of illuminated vending machines against the building wall

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the illuminated concrete stairs, leaving the NPCs and billboard behind, and enters an upper plaza level featuring reflective water pools and palm trees in planters. The wet pavement continues to reflect the vibrant neon lights of the surrounding cyberpunk cityscape as the camera moves through the empty upper level.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a bright, sunny waterfront promenade into a dark, neon-drenched cyberpunk plaza. It begins by moving forward past a large green commercial building and palm trees toward a wooden pergola, with distant skyscrapers framing the horizon. As the environment shifts abruptly to night, the camera glides across wet, reflective pavement toward a group of NPCs gathered beneath a glowing Wild Blue billboard. The scene then ascends a set of illuminated concrete stairs, leaving the crowd behind to enter an upper plaza level. Finally, the camera moves through this elevated space, passing reflective water pools and potted palms that mirror the vibrant neon lights of the surrounding cityscape.
